The programme, called “AI for Everyone,” would make South Korea the first G20 nation to offer AI to its entire population as a public service. That would make it the largest listing by a Chinese semiconductor […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Reflection signs a $1bn AI compute deal with Nebius, its second big capacity grab in a month https://thenextweb.com/news/reflection-nebius-1-billion-ai-compute-deal Wed, 15 Jul 2026 14:30:17 +0000 TheNextWeb=591e4177925d047ddd7fcc018f825a56 Reflection AI has locked in more computing power. It gives Reflection access to Nvidia’s newest GB300 chips. Nebius confirmed the deal. PrismML chief executive Babak Hassibi told CNBC that Apple and other companies were evaluating its technology.
